title: ARCHITECTURE AND DEVELOPMENT PLAN TEMPLATE - [PROJECT NAME]

projectOverview.title: 1.1 Project Overview
projectOverview.description: [PROJECT NAME] is a [SYSTEM TYPE, e.g., SaaS, Mobile App, Web Platform] designed for [PROJECT'S MAIN GOAL].

mainTechnologyStack.title: A. Main Technology Stack
mainTechnologyStack.description: [Detail the chosen tech stack here: language, framework, database, etc.]

architecturalDecisionRecords.title: B. Architectural Decision Records (ADRs)
architecturalDecisionRecords.description: Key architectural decisions for this project are documented as Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) in the `/docs/adr` directory. Refer to ADR-001, ADR-002, etc., for detailed context, decisions, and consequences. (ADR template now includes a 'Scope' section for machine readability.)

entityRelationshipDiagram.title: 3.1 Entity-Relationship Diagram
entityRelationshipDiagram.mermaidSyntax:
erDiagram
    ENTITY_A ||--o{ ENTITY_B : "has"
    ENTITY_B ||--|{ ENTITY_C : "contains"
    ENTITY_A {
        UUID id PK "NOT NULL UNIQUE"
        string name "NOT NULL"
        text description "NULL"
        timestamp created_at "NOT NULL"
        timestamp updated_at "NOT NULL"
    }
    ENTITY_B {
        UUID id PK "NOT NULL UNIQUE"
        string title "NOT NULL"
        UUID entity_a_id FK "NOT NULL"
        boolean is_active "DEFAULT TRUE"
        timestamp created_at "NOT NULL"
        timestamp updated_at "NOT NULL"
    }
    ENTITY_C {
        UUID id PK "NOT NULL UNIQUE"
        string detail "NOT NULL"
        UUID entity_b_id FK "NOT NULL"
        timestamp created_at "NOT NULL"
        timestamp updated_at "NOT NULL"
    }
entityRelationshipDiagram.note: [Replace the example above with your project's actual ER diagram. Use Markdown preview or GitHub to render.]

apiEndpoints.title: 4.3 API Endpoints (Per Module)
apiEndpoints.note: [Define key API endpoints for each module, specifying HTTP method, path, and expected parameters. This enables automated routing and basic API client generation.]

pendingDecisions.description: To finalize the project scope, the following points need clarification:
